title: How AI Assistants Are Reshaping Internal Communications
summary: Teams are using AI assistants to draft updates, summarize meetings, and speed approvals with human review.

title: Newsrooms Test Practical AI Workflows for Research and Editing
summary: Editors are trialing retrieval and summarization tools to reduce repetitive prep while preserving editorial control.

title: Enterprises Focus on AI Literacy Programs for Non-Technical Staff
summary: Large organizations are building practical training to help business teams adopt AI tools responsibly.

title: Customer Service Teams Use AI Drafting to Reduce Response Time
summary: Pilot programs show faster first responses and better consistency when agents use AI-generated drafts with oversight.
